description_long: This object is a smart display device with a rectangular touchscreen set within a light gray bezel. The front features a wide, landscape-oriented screen with a black lower border, likely housing sensors or microphones. The back is covered in a textured gray fabric, with a small circular logo and a white button or sensor near the bottom right. The device is supported by a conical stand that is integrated into the rear, providing stability and a slight backward tilt for optimal viewing. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible physical buttons on the front or sides, and the materials suggest a combination of plastic, glass, and fabric. The device is compact and intended for tabletop or countertop use, commonly found in smart home or office environments.
description: A compact smart display with a wide touchscreen, light gray bezel, and a textured gray fabric back supported by a conical stand.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide touchscreen, light gray bezel, and black lower border.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the device's slim profile and conical stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the textured gray fabric back, brand logo, and a small white button or sensor.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the angled support and slimness of the device.
attribute_screen_presence: Visible screen, rectangular, landscape-oriented, occupying most of the front face with a black lower border.
attribute_bezel_design: Light gray bezel, medium width, symmetrical on all sides, rounded corners, smooth finish.
attribute_button_placement: No visible buttons on the front or sides; one small button or sensor on the lower right of the back.
attribute_brand_logo: Visible brand logo on the back, centered, small, white 'G' on gray fabric.
attribute_camera_location: Small camera centered above the screen on the front bezel.
